datasets.name: 7b732535
queryLines:
-- Updated coach profile query with corrected named_struct array (no trailing comma)
WITH p AS (
  SELECT
    cp.coach_id,
    cp.coach_name,
    cp.nation_name_display,
    cp.flag_emoji,
    cp.games_played_all,
    cp.wins,
    cp.draws,
    cp.losses,
    cp.tournaments_played,
    cp.nations_played,
    cp.opponents_count,
    cp.active_since_year,
    cp.last_active_year,
    cp.global_elo_current,
    cp.global_elo_peak_last_50,
    cp.global_elo_median_all,
    cp.opponent_global_elo_median_weighted,
    cp.world_rank_current,
    cp.nation_rank_current,
    cp.world_rank_peak,
    cp.nation_rank_peak,
    cp.world_rank_median,
    cp.nation_rank_median,
    cp.world_rank_opp_median,
    cp.nation_rank_opp_median,
    cp.selector_rank_national,
    cp.selector_score_national,
    cp.selector_score_global,
    cp.selector_rank_global,
    cp.best_win_streak,
    cp.current_win_streak,
    cp.best_unbeaten_streak,
    cp.current_unbeaten_streak,
    cp.load_timestamp
  FROM
    naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_profile cp
),
last_50_stats AS (
  SELECT
    h.coach_id,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN h.result_numeric = 1.0 THEN 1
        ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS last50_wins,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN h.result_numeric = 0.5 THEN 1
        ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS last50_draws,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN h.result_numeric = 0.0 THEN 1
        ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS last50_losses
  FROM
    (
      SELECT
        coach_id,
        result_numeric,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY coach_id ORDER BY game_index DESC) AS rn
      FROM
        naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_global_elo_rating_history
      WHERE
        rating_system = 'NAF_ELO'
    ) h
      CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT
          CAST(last_n_games_window AS INT) AS n
        FROM
          naf_catalog.gold_dim.analytical_config
      ) cfg
  WHERE
    h.rn <= cfg.n
  GROUP BY
    h.coach_id
  HAVING
    COUNT(*) >= MAX(cfg.n)
),
p2 AS (
  SELECT
    p.*,
    l50.last50_wins,
    l50.last50_draws,
    l50.last50_losses
  FROM
    p
      LEFT JOIN last_50_stats l50
        ON p.coach_id = l50.coach_id
)
SELECT
  p2.coach_id,
  row.sort_order,
  row.label,
  row.profile,
  p2.load_timestamp
FROM
  p2
  LATERAL VIEW
    explode(
      array(
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          1,
          'label',
          '👤 NAF Name',
          'profile',
          coalesce(p2.coach_name, 'Unknown coach')
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          2,
          'label',
          '🔢 NAF Number',
          'profile',
          cast(p2.coach_id as string)
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          3,
          'label',
          '🌍 Nation',
          'profile',
          concat(coalesce(p2.flag_emoji, '🌐'), ' ', coalesce(p2.nation_name_display, 'Unknown'))
        ),
        named_struct('sort_order', 10, 'label', '📊 Overview', 'profile', ''),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          11,
          'label',
          ' • Total games (all)',
          'profile',
          concat(
            cast(p2.games_played_all as string),
            ' (',
            cast(p2.wins as string),
            '/',
            cast(p2.draws as string),
            '/',
            cast(p2.losses as string),
            ')'
          )
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          12,
          'label',
          ' • Last 50 games (W/D/L)',
          'profile',
          CASE
            WHEN
              p2.last50_wins IS NOT NULL
            THEN
              concat(
                cast(p2.last50_wins as string),
                '/',
                cast(p2.last50_draws as string),
                '/',
                cast(p2.last50_losses as string)
              )
            ELSE 'N/A'
          END
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          13,
          'label',
          ' • Tournaments',
          'profile',
          coalesce(cast(p2.tournaments_played as string), '0')
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          14,
          'label',
          ' • Nations played',
          'profile',
          coalesce(cast(p2.nations_played as string), '0')
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          15,
          'label',
          ' • Opponents faced',
          'profile',
          coalesce(cast(p2.opponents_count as string), '0')
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          16,
          'label',
          ' • Active since / Last active years',
          'profile',
          concat(cast(p2.active_since_year as string), ' / ', cast(p2.last_active_year as string))
        ),
        named_struct('sort_order', 20, 'label', '📈 Ratings (#N / #W)', 'profile', ''),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          21,
          'label',
          ' • Current GLO',
          'profile',
          CASE WHEN p2.global_elo_current IS NOT NULL THEN concat(cast(round(p2.global_elo_current, 1) as string), ' (#', cast(p2.nation_rank_current as string), ' / #', cast(p2.world_rank_current as string), ')') ELSE 'N/A' END
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          22,
          'label',
          ' • Peak GLO',
          'profile',
          CASE WHEN p2.global_elo_peak_last_50 IS NOT NULL THEN concat(cast(round(p2.global_elo_peak_last_50, 1) as string), ' (#', cast(p2.nation_rank_peak as string), ' / #', cast(p2.world_rank_peak as string), ')') ELSE 'N/A' END
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          23,
          'label',
          ' • Median GLO',
          'profile',
          CASE WHEN p2.global_elo_median_all IS NOT NULL THEN concat(cast(round(p2.global_elo_median_all, 1) as string), ' (#', cast(p2.nation_rank_median as string), ' / #', cast(p2.world_rank_median as string), ')') ELSE 'N/A' END
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          24,
          'label',
          ' • Opponent Strength',
          'profile',
          CASE WHEN p2.opponent_global_elo_median_weighted IS NOT NULL THEN concat(cast(round(p2.opponent_global_elo_median_weighted, 1) as string), ' (#', cast(p2.nation_rank_opp_median as string), ' / #', cast(p2.world_rank_opp_median as string), ')') ELSE 'N/A' END
        ),
        named_struct('sort_order', 30, 'label', '🔥 Streaks', 'profile', ''),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          31,
          'label',
          ' • Best win / Current win',
          'profile',
          concat(cast(p2.best_win_streak as string), ' / ', cast(p2.current_win_streak as string))
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          32,
          'label',
          ' • Best unbeaten / Current unbeaten',
          'profile',
          concat(
            cast(p2.best_unbeaten_streak as string),
            ' / ',
            cast(p2.current_unbeaten_streak as string)
          )
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          27,
          'label',
          '🏆 SSR (#N / #W)',
          'profile',
          CASE WHEN p2.selector_rank_national IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(p2.selector_score_national, 1) AS STRING), ' (#', CAST(p2.selector_rank_national AS STRING), ' / #', CAST(p2.selector_rank_global AS STRING), ')') ELSE 'N/A' END
        )
      )
    ) e
    AS row
ORDER BY
  p2.coach_id,
  row.sort_order;

datasets.name: 7e6b0b4b
queryLines:
-- DASHBOARD DATASET: coach_cumulative_results_daily_series (contract-aligned)
-- Source contract: naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_cumulative_results_daily_series
SELECT
  coach_id,
  coach_name,
  event_day,
  result,
  value
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_cumulative_results_daily_series
WHERE scope = 'GLOBAL'
  AND race_id = 0
ORDER BY
  coach_id,
  event_day,
  result_order;

datasets.name: f9e6a4b3
queryLines:
SELECT
  *
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_cumulative_results_last_n_daily_series
ORDER BY
  coach_id,
  event_day,
  result_order;

datasets.name: 92b53229
queryLines:
-- QUERY: Overall results (dashboard dataset)
SELECT
  coach_id,
  level,
  result,
  value
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_results_all_long
ORDER BY coach_id, level, result;

datasets.name: a59b382e
queryLines:
-- QUERY: coach_race_performance (dashboard dataset)
-- Top races by games played, with optional race filter.
-- PARAMS: :min_games INT, :max_races INT (default 6)

WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(COALESCE(:min_games, 0) AS INT) AS min_games,
    CAST(COALESCE(:max_races, 5) AS INT) AS max_races
),
-- World rank for best race Elo peak (across all coaches)
best_race AS (
  SELECT
    coach_id,
    MAX(elo_peak_all) AS best_elo_peak,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY MAX(elo_peak_all) DESC) AS best_race_elo_world_rank
  FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_race_performance
  WHERE race_id <> 0 AND elo_peak_all IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY coach_id
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    crp.*,
    br.best_elo_peak,
    br.best_race_elo_world_rank,
    CASE WHEN crp.elo_peak_all = br.best_elo_peak THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_best_race_elo,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY crp.coach_id
      ORDER BY crp.games_played DESC, crp.race_id ASC
    ) AS race_rank
  FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_race_performance AS crp
  CROSS JOIN params AS p
  LEFT JOIN best_race AS br ON crp.coach_id = br.coach_id
  WHERE COALESCE(crp.games_played, 0) >= p.min_games
    AND crp.race_id <> 0
)
SELECT * EXCEPT (last_game_event_timestamp), CAST(last_game_event_timestamp AS DATE) AS last_game_date
FROM ranked
CROSS JOIN params AS p
WHERE race_rank <= p.max_races
ORDER BY coach_id, games_played DESC, race_id;

datasets.name: 52345e69
queryLines:
SELECT
  coach_id,
  coach_name,
  game_week,
  glo_weekly,
  glo_running_peak,
  glo_running_median
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_global_elo_rating_daily_series
WHERE rating_system = 'NAF_ELO'
  AND (:start_date IS NULL OR game_week >= CAST(:start_date AS DATE))
  AND (:end_date IS NULL OR game_week <= CAST(:end_date AS DATE))
ORDER BY coach_id, game_week;

datasets.name: 7287b5e0
queryLines:
SELECT
  coach_id,
  coach_name,
  race_id,
  race_name,
  game_week,
  elo_weekly,
  race_rank_by_games
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_race_elo_rating_daily_series
WHERE rating_system = 'NAF_ELO'
  AND (:start_date IS NULL OR game_week >= CAST(:start_date AS DATE))
  AND (:end_date IS NULL OR game_week <= CAST(:end_date AS DATE))
  AND race_rank_by_games <= CAST(COALESCE(:max_races, 6) AS INT)
ORDER BY coach_id, race_name, game_week;

datasets.name: 3660cd57
queryLines:
-- QUERY: coach_opponent_insights (dashboard dataset)
-- PURPOSE: Per-coach opponent insights table for dashboards (strength + outcomes vs opponents)
-- OUTPUT GRAIN: One row per (coach_id, category, opponent_coach_id)
-- SOURCE CONTRACT: naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_opponent_insights
SELECT
  *,
  CONCAT(
    CAST(games_played AS STRING),
    '(',
    CAST(wins AS STRING),
    '/',
    CAST(draws AS STRING),
    '/',
    CAST(losses AS STRING),
    ')'
  ) AS games_wdl
FROM
  naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_opponent_insights

datasets.name: 15dbc912
queryLines:
SELECT coach_id, bin_index, bin_label, opponents_count, games_played, wins, draws, losses, win_points, win_points_per_game
FROM naf_catalog.gold_summary.coach_opponent_median_glo_bin_summary
ORDER BY bin_index

datasets.name: f732672a
queryLines:
SELECT coach_id, bin_index, category, result, result_order, value, result_pct
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_opponent_median_glo_bin_results_long
ORDER BY bin_index, result_order

datasets.name: coach_race_profile
queryLines:
WITH race_data AS (
  SELECT
    crp.coach_id,
    crp.race_name,
    crp.games_played,
    crp.wins,
    crp.draws,
    crp.losses,
    crp.points_per_game,
    crp.elo_peak_all,
    crp.elo_current,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY crp.coach_id ORDER BY crp.games_played DESC, crp.race_id ASC) AS rn
  FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_race_performance crp
  WHERE crp.race_id <> 0 AND crp.games_played > 0
),
total_games AS (
  SELECT coach_id, SUM(games_played) AS total_race_games
  FROM race_data
  GROUP BY coach_id
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    coach_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT race_name) AS distinct_races,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(points_per_game, 0.5), 2) AS median_race_ppg,
    MAX(elo_peak_all) AS best_race_elo_peak,
    MAX_BY(race_name, elo_peak_all) AS best_race_name
  FROM race_data
  GROUP BY coach_id
),
best_ranked AS (
  SELECT *, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY best_race_elo_peak DESC) AS best_race_world_rank
  FROM agg
),
fav AS (
  SELECT * FROM race_data WHERE rn = 1
),
combined AS (
  SELECT
    f.coach_id,
    f.race_name AS fav_race_name,
    f.games_played AS fav_games,
    f.wins AS fav_wins,
    f.draws AS fav_draws,
    f.losses AS fav_losses,
    f.points_per_game AS fav_ppg,
    ROUND(100.0 * f.games_played / tg.total_race_games, 1) AS fav_pct_of_total,
    a.distinct_races,
    a.median_race_ppg,
    a.best_race_elo_peak,
    a.best_race_name,
    a.best_race_world_rank
  FROM fav f
  JOIN best_ranked a ON f.coach_id = a.coach_id
  JOIN total_games tg ON f.coach_id = tg.coach_id
),
header_rows AS (
  SELECT
    c.coach_id,
    row.sort_order,
    row.label,
    row.profile
  FROM combined c
  LATERAL VIEW EXPLODE(ARRAY(
    named_struct('sort_order', 1, 'label', '🎯 Favourite Race', 'profile', ''),
    named_struct('sort_order', 2, 'label', ' • Race', 'profile', c.fav_race_name),
    named_struct('sort_order', 3, 'label', ' • Record (W/D/L)', 'profile', CONCAT(CAST(c.fav_games AS STRING), ' (', CAST(c.fav_wins AS STRING), '/', CAST(c.fav_draws AS STRING), '/', CAST(c.fav_losses AS STRING), ')')),
    named_struct('sort_order', 4, 'label', ' • PPG', 'profile', CAST(ROUND(c.fav_ppg, 2) AS STRING)),
    named_struct('sort_order', 5, 'label', ' • % of total games', 'profile', CONCAT(CAST(c.fav_pct_of_total AS STRING), '%')),
    named_struct('sort_order', 10, 'label', '📊 Race Stats', 'profile', ''),
    named_struct('sort_order', 11, 'label', ' • Distinct races played', 'profile', CAST(c.distinct_races AS STRING)),
    named_struct('sort_order', 12, 'label', ' • Median race PPG', 'profile', CAST(c.median_race_ppg AS STRING)),
    named_struct('sort_order', 13, 'label', ' • Best race Elo', 'profile', CASE WHEN c.best_race_elo_peak IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(c.best_race_name, ': ', CAST(ROUND(c.best_race_elo_peak, 1) AS STRING), ' (#', CAST(c.best_race_world_rank AS STRING), ')') ELSE 'N/A' END),
    named_struct('sort_order', 20, 'label', '📋 Race Ratings and Records', 'profile', '')
  )) e AS row
),
race_rows AS (
  SELECT
    rd.coach_id,
    CAST(20 + rd.rn AS INT) AS sort_order,
    CONCAT(' • ', rd.race_name) AS label,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(rd.games_played AS STRING), ' (',
      CAST(rd.wins AS STRING), '/', CAST(rd.draws AS STRING), '/', CAST(rd.losses AS STRING),
      ') | Elo: ',
      COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(rd.elo_current, 0) AS STRING), '-'),
      ' / ',
      COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(rd.elo_peak_all, 0) AS STRING), '-')
    ) AS profile
  FROM race_data rd
  WHERE rd.rn <= 5
)
SELECT * FROM header_rows
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM race_rows
ORDER BY coach_id, sort_order
